message:
fix: detectBeadsPrefixFromConfig misparses multi-hyphen issue IDs (gt-mawit)

The fallback logic in detectBeadsPrefixFromConfig used strings.LastIndex to
extract the prefix from the first issue ID in issues.jsonl. For agent beads
like 'gt-demo-witness', this extracted 'gt-demo' instead of 'gt'.

Fix: parse multiple lines and only consider IDs with 5-char alphanumeric
hash suffixes (standard bead format), filtering out agent beads, merge
requests, and other multi-hyphen IDs. Require consensus across all matching
IDs before returning a prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
